differential_diagnoses: Coronary artery embolism from left ventricular thrombus
next_steps: Serologic testing for Trypanosoma cruzi antibodies
Implantable cardioverter-defibrillator (ICD) implantation for primary prevention of sudden cardiac death
Genetic counseling and comprehensive cardiomyopathy panel testing
Continued guideline-directed medical therapy with close monitoring of ventricular function
Holter monitoring to assess for persistent high-grade arrhythmias
